title: Phishing email response
safe_steps: Do not click links or open attachments.
If clicked, stop using that session and report immediately.
Change password only through official company login page if directed by support.
advanced_steps: Review headers, URL, attachment sandbox, sign-in logs, mailbox rules.
do_not_do: Do not run destructive commands without approval.
Do not ask users to share passwords.
technician_notes: Confirm scope: one user, multiple users, or full site.
Record final fix into the client-specific KB.
